name: Tanngnjostr of the Nordic Beasts
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>タングニョースト
desc: When a monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, when this Defense Position card on the field is changed to face-up Attack Position: You can Special Summon 1 "Nordic Beast" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Tanngnjostr of the Nordic Beasts".
mnst_eff: When a monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, when this Defense Position card on the field is changed to face-up Attack Position: You can Special Summon 1 "Nordic Beast" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Tanngnjostr of the Nordic Beasts".
eff: When a monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
